creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to johans from comment #13)
> (In reply to kredaxx from comment #10)
> 
> We've been seeing random reboots on our systems, and we had a panic on our
> systems which was:
> 
> panic: pf_hashsrc: unknown address family 0
> cpuid = 2
> 
> #0  doadump (textdump=<value optimized out>) at pcpu.h:219
> #1  0xffffffff80927d82 in kern_reboot (howto=260) at
> /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:452
> #2  0xffffffff80928144 in panic (fmt=<value optimized out>) at
> /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:759
> #3  0xffffffff81c16bf5 in pf_src_tree_remove_state (s=<value optimized out>)
> at /usr/src/sys/modules/pf/../../netpfil/pf/pf.c:400
> #4  0xffffffff81c164f9 in pf_unlink_state (s=0xfffff8001ad28a68,
> flags=<value optimized out>) at
> /usr/src/sys/modules/pf/../../netpfil/pf/pf.c:1579
> #5  0xffffffff81c160fd in pf_purge_expired_states (i=<value optimized out>,
> maxcheck=<value optimized out>) at
> /usr/src/sys/modules/pf/../../netpfil/pf/pf.c:1631
> #6  0xffffffff81c15c95 in pf_purge_thread (v=<value optimized out>) at
> /usr/src/sys/modules/pf/../../netpfil/pf/pf.c:1428
> #7  0xffffffff808f8b6a in fork_exit (callout=0xffffffff81c15bc0
> <pf_purge_thread>, arg=0x0, frame=0xfffffe03dd053c00) at
> /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_fork.c:996
> #8  0xffffffff80d0aede in fork_trampoline () at
> /usr/src/sys/amd64/amd64/exception.S:606
> #9  0x0000000000000000 in ?? ()
> Current language:  auto; currently minimal
> 
> 
> Have you been seeing anything similar?
> 
> I'm uncertain at this moment wether this is related to this patch or
> completely unrelated. If you are seeing similar problems would greatly help
> finding out more details.

Have you run into this panic again since using the patch?
